message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "RTP" #LightGray
    participant RtpSenderEgress
    participant ModuleRtpRtcpImpl
    participant PacketRouter
    participant ProcessThreadImpl
    participant PacingController
    participant PacedSender
    participant RTPSender
    participant RTPSenderAudio
end box

box "Call" #WhiteSmoke
    participant AudioCodingModuleImpl
    participant ChannelReceive
    participant ChannelSend
    participant AcmReceiver
end box

box "NetEq" #AliceBlue
    participant AudioSourceStream
    participant AudioMixerImpl
    participant AudioTransportImpl
end box

box "Audio" #LavenderBlush
    participant AudioDeviceBuffer
    participant AudioTrackJni
    participant AudioRecordJni
end box


' === 1. Recording Path (Top Right) ===
activate AudioRecordJni
AudioRecordJni ->> +AudioRecordJni : DataIsRecorded()
deactivate AudioRecordJni

AudioRecordJni --> -AudioTrackJni : DeliverRecordedData()
activate AudioTrackJni
AudioTrackJni --> -AudioDeviceBuffer 
deactivate AudioTrackJni

AudioDeviceBuffer -->>+ AudioSourceStream : RecordedDataAvailable()
deactivate AudioSourceStream



' === 2. Encoding & Sending Initiation Flow (Middle to Left/Bottom) ===
ChannelSend ->>+AcmReceiver : SendAudio()
Note over AcmReceiver,AudioSourceStream: This arrow connects Call Box\nand NetEQ Box visually in original.\nIn strict logic this might be internal or via callback,\nmapped here for visual fidelity of flow direction if needed by user's intent but omitted per standard unless explicit call exists between these two lifelines directly without intermediate steps not shown clearly enough from just arrows alone; however since there IS an actual line drawn connecting them indirectly through other components we'll keep direct connection implied where appropriate based on context clues given earlier analysis phase.) 

Actually looking again at your provided description more carefully now I see you mentioned specific interactions like “ProcessAndEncode” happening within certain modules so let me restructure accordingly while keeping all elements intact including those subtle details about encoding process etc.:

Let’s break down each section step-by-step ensuring nothing gets missed out especially regarding how data flows across different boxes/modules involved during recording/playback scenarios depicted above..starting fresh approach below...

---

### Revised Detailed Breakdown Based On Your Description Plus My Initial Analysis Combined Together For Clarity And Accuracy :-
